title: Red Cell CI analysis of Russian cognitive deception; 12 COA dossiers
public_claim: Red Cell CI analysis of Russian cognitive deception; 12 COA dossiers is a preserved project packet for a structured working-package for the user's capstone thesis: "Red Cell Counterintelligence Analysis of Russian Cognitive Deception".
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is research-governance conversion: preserve the design, stimulus materials, coding or scoring logic, reliability ceiling, and manuscript role without overstating empirical completion.
use_value: It links regional knowledge to analytic method by preserving source lineage, strategic frame, adversary logic, and claim limits for later Russia/security work.
